flashy.digitizers.caen_dt5781 package

Submodules

flashy.digitizers.caen_dt5781.acquisition module

class flashy.digitizers.caen_dt5781.acquisition.CaenDT5781Acquisition

Bases: object

Class responsable for interacting with Caen’s DT5781 digitizer.

get_basic_info()

Retrieve the digitizer’s board information.

Raises:

ConnectionError – If the digitizer cannot be reached.

Returns:

The board’s information.

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

run(acquisition_config, on_event_dump=None)

Begin the acquisition of new data using the digitizer.

Parameters:

acquisition_config (AcquisitionConfig) – The acquisition configuration to use.

Raises:

Exception – If an unknown digitizer error occurs.

Returns:

All detected events if the signals are not set up.

Return type:

list

stop()
property state
set_state_callback(callback)
property is_acquiring: bool
property is_busy: bool

flashy.digitizers.caen_dt5781.channel module

class flashy.digitizers.caen_dt5781.channel.CaenDT5781Channel(values=<factory>)

Bases: ParameterContainer

Dataclass for the configuration of a Caen’s DT5781 digitizer channel.

Inherits:

ParameterContainer

DEFINITIONS: ClassVar[Mapping[str, ParameterDefinition]]

Parameter definitions for Caen’s DT5781 digitizer channels (See CAENDT5781_CHANNEL_DEFINITIONS).

flashy.digitizers.caen_dt5781.config module

class flashy.digitizers.caen_dt5781.config.CaenDT5781Config(channels, name='DT5781A', familycode='XX781', fw_type='DPP-PHA', serial_num=27916, max_rawdata_size=1573904.0, adc_nbits=14, adc_samplrate_msps=100.0)

Bases: Struct

Configuration for the Caen DT5781 digitizer.

Inherits:

msgspec.Struct

channels: list[CaenDT5781Channel]

List of channel configurations.

name: str

Human-readable device name.

familycode: str

Hardware family code.

fw_type: str

Firmware type.

serial_num: int

Device serial number.

max_rawdata_size: float

Maximum raw data size in bytes.

adc_nbits: int

ADC resolution in bits.

adc_samplrate_msps: float

ADC sampling rate in MSPS.

property display_name: str
property sampling_period_ns: float

Sampling period in nanoseconds.

Returns:

Sampling period computed from ADC sampling rate.

Return type:

float

get_adc_to_volts_factor(channel_id)

Compute ADC-to-volts conversion factor for a channel.

Parameters:

channel_id (int) – Index of the channel.

Returns:

Conversion factor based on coarse gain and ADC resolution.

Return type:

float

flashy.digitizers.caen_dt5781.definition.CAENDT5781_CHANNEL_DEFINITIONS

Parameter definitions for Caen’s DT5781 digitizer channels.

flashy.digitizers.caen_dt5781.handler module

flashy.digitizers.caen_dt5781.worker module

class flashy.digitizers.caen_dt5781.worker.CaenDT5781AcquisitionWorker(acquisition, config)

Bases: QThread

Wrapper class for the acquisition service to be used in a seperate thread.

Specific to Caen’s DT5781 digitizer.

Inherits:

PySide6.QtCore.QThread

run()

Start the acquisition of new data.

stop()

Stop the acquisition as requested by the main thread.
